---
name: test-driven-development
description: Write a failing test before implementing any fix or feature. Use when fixing bugs, adding features, or refactoring code that lacks test coverage.
---

# Test-Driven Development

## Overview
Always demonstrate the bug or missing behavior with a failing test before touching implementation code.

## When to Use
Use when fixing a reported bug, adding a feature, or refactoring untested code.

## Verification
The failing test must be shown failing before the fix, and the full suite must pass after.
